name: @findmephoto/mcp
description: FindMe.Photo MCP is a server that uses AI to find your photos in a large gallery of images.

GALLERY_PATH.description: Path to the photo gallery directory.

MODELS_PATH.description: Path to the directory where face recognition models will be stored.

PORT.description: Port for the server to listen on. Defaults to 3000.

HOST.description: Host for the server to bind to. Defaults to 0.0.0.0.

tools.name: startIndexing
tools.description: Starts the indexing process for the photo gallery. This can take a long time and should only be run once initially or when new photos are added.

tools.name: searchByImage
tools.description: Searches for a person in the indexed gallery using a provided image.

image.description: Base64 encoded image of the person to search for.

docker.description: Run using Docker (recommended). This method encapsulates all dependencies.

npm.description: Run from source using npm after cloning the repository.

examples.title: Search for a Person
examples.description: Example of how to use the /search endpoint with curl to find photos of a specific person.
